title: premna fohaiensis
intro: Premna fohaiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Chinese lavender tree. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Premna fohaiensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
